race.comment: ASTRODEAN (4) couldn't match motors with an impressive winner last time but still stuck on bravely for third. The form around his Bordertown run second-up is red hot when finishing second. Peaking now and should play a significant role. TOES IN FIRST  (2) made light work of his rivals two back after sitting on speed at Bordertown. Was too bad to be true last time when dropping out quickly in the lane but is worth forgiving. HASTA LA PRINCE (8) turned in a much better effort last start at Bordertown when closing off well in tough conditions behind TIF. Will likely drift back from his draw, so watch for him late. MY TRUTH (9) hasn't fired in his last two but has earlier form that measures up. Backs up quickly and is one for the wider exotics.
